title: Mork Borg Supplements and My Top 5 Metal Albums
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZfQ7oKzL-Pw

Daniel (@dungeondive) provides flip-throughs of three new Mörk Borg supplements—Heretic, Book of Misery Volume 1, and Valley of Forbidden Churches—showcasing new classes, creatures, adventures, and campaign settings. Heretic includes cult generators and the massive Graves Left Wanting cemetery campaign. Book of Misery provides additional character classes and monsters. Valley of Forbidden Churches offers a hex-crawl setting with abandoned churches and demon-infested tunnels. Following the supplement review, Daniel shares his top five metal albums of 2022, ranging from industrial doom to progressive folk metal.

----

Which Mörk Borg supplement interests you most, and what kind of campaign setting appeals to your gaming style?
